arguments.task: Research Paygent Connect (NMI-powered) using only official first-party pages. Open and read canonical NMI pages that support: 1) what Paygent Connect is or how it is positioned, 2) API/developer docs and authentication methods, 3) pricing, plans, signup, or partner/contact-sales gating, 4) API style such as REST/SOAP/GraphQL if documented, and 5) any official MCP/server references if they exist. Return the exact URLs visited and concise evidence-backed findings only from page content you actually read. If docs are thin, JS-rendered, gated, contradictory, or unavailable, say so explicitly.

raw_result.gating_reason: Official evidence gathered did not surface a self-serve signup, pricing, or trial page for a verified "Paygent Connect" product. The researched official domain was NMI, where the browser run found developer-documentation entry points but did not verify self-serve access for the named app.
